skills.name: sonicsaas-user-docs
skills.description: End-user documentation portal for SonicSaaS — getting-started guides, integration setup (ITGlue, ConnectWise, Splunk, Entra ID), policy authoring, and operational playbooks.

skills.name: sonicsaas-api
skills.description: SonicSaaS REST API — secure fleet management for MSPs managing SonicWall firewalls. Exposes device inventory, configuration, policies, operations, alerting, backups, and firmware management. Authenticated via API key (Bearer sk_live_...).

skills.name: sonicsaas-api-docs
skills.description: Human-readable Swagger UI for the SonicSaaS REST API — interactive try-it-out console with auth, request/response schemas, and examples.
